Description: Circular portrait frame overlay on transparent background. Rough-hewn dark oak wood texture with visible grain and minor cracks. Frame border is 30-40px thick. Inner edge has a thin 2px dark brown (#3E2723) bevel. Outer edge has subtle wood knots and a hand-carved look. No gems, no metal — purely rustic wood. Color palette: warm browns (#5D4037, #795548, #4E342E). Slight shadow on the inner ring to create depth for the avatar cutout. Style: hand-painted fantasy RPG, matte finish, no glow effects.
Notes: assets/frames/peasant.png — composited with player profile picture via Pillow. Avatar sits inside circular cutout (center ~380px diameter). Frame must have clean alpha edges.

Description: Circular portrait frame overlay on transparent background. Hammered bronze metal frame with brushed copper finish. Frame border 35-45px thick with raised rivets (8 evenly spaced) around outer edge. Inner bevel is polished bronze (#CD7F32) catching light from upper-left. Outer edge has thin engraved rope pattern. Two small crossed-sword emblems at top center (10px each). Color palette: bronze (#CD7F32), dark copper (#B87333), shadow brown (#6D4C1A). Subtle metallic sheen — not flat, not mirror. Style: semi-realistic fantasy metalwork, warm lighting.
Notes: assets/frames/squire.png — must maintain consistent inner cutout diameter (~380px) across all frames.

Description: Circular portrait frame overlay on transparent background. Polished silver steel frame with cool blue-silver finish. Frame border 40-50px thick. Four symmetrically placed shield-shaped ornaments at cardinal points (N/S/E/W) each ~20px. Engraved chevron pattern along frame band. Inner edge has sharp beveled ridge with bright specular highlight from upper-left. Outer edge trimmed with thin line of dark gunmetal (#37474F). Color palette: silver (#C0C0C0), steel blue (#607D8B), gunmetal (#37474F), white highlights. Small scratch marks in metal for battle-worn authenticity. Style: polished armor aesthetic, cool-toned lighting.

Circular portrait frame overlay on transparent background. Ornate gold frame with rich warm tones. Frame border 45-55px thick with intricate filigree scrollwork carved into the band. Laurel wreath motif at top (two branches meeting at a crown point). Inner edge has deep chamfered bevel with bright gold (#FFD700) highlights. Outer edge decorated with repeating fleur-de-lis pattern. Small ruby-red gems (#B71C1C, 4 total) at diagonal corners, each ~8px with white specular dot. Color palette: rich gold (#FFD700), antique gold (#DAA520), deep amber (#FF8F00), ruby red accents. Style: royal regalia, warm luxurious lighting, hand-gilded look.

Circular portrait frame overlay on transparent background. Radiant gold frame with integrated wing motifs. Frame border 50-60px thick. Two sweeping angel/eagle wings extend from left and right sides, each ~60px tall, curving upward beyond the circle boundary. Wings are gold (#FFD700) with individually rendered feather details transitioning from bright gold at base to white-gold (#FFF8E1) at tips. Frame band has hammered gold texture with central groove filled with glowing amber light (#FFAB00, 50% opacity). Inner edge emits soft warm radiance (2-3px glow, #FFF176 at 30% opacity). Five-pointed star emblem at top center between wing bases. Color palette: bright gold, amber glow, white-gold, warm white. Style: epic fantasy, heroic iconography, dramatic top-lit.
Notes: assets/frames/hero.png — wings extend beyond 512px circle but stay within 512x512 canvas

Description: Circular portrait frame overlay on transparent background. Platinum-white frame with ethereal luminescence. Frame border 50-65px thick. Material is polished platinum (#E0E0E0) with inner iridescent sheen shifting between pale blue (#BBDEFB) and soft violet (#CE93D8). Eight diamond-shaped crystals evenly spaced around frame, each ~12px, glowing with internal white light (small radial glow 4px, #FFFFFF at 40% opacity). Ornate interlocking chain pattern engraved along frame band. Pair of upswept dragon-horn shapes at top (~30px tall each) in darker platinum (#9E9E9E) with luminous edges. Outer edge emits soft ambient glow (6-8px, pale blue #90CAF9 at 20% opacity). Inner edge has crisp bright-white highlight line (1px). Color palette: platinum white, pale blue, soft violet, diamond white. Style: ethereal high-fantasy, otherworldly radiance, clean and luminous.

Circular portrait frame overlay on transparent background. Cosmic-tier frame radiating supernatural energy. Frame border 55-70px thick. Base material is obsidian black (#1A1A2E) with veins of molten gold (#FFD700) and electric violet (#7C4DFF) running through it like cracked magma. Outer perimeter surrounded by pulsing energy aura — layered glow rings: inner ring electric violet (#7C4DFF, 8px, 50% opacity), middle ring deep purple (#4A148C, 12px, 30% opacity), outer ring fading to transparent. Floating arcane rune symbols (4 total at diagonals) hovering 5-10px outside frame, each ~15px, glowing cyan (#00E5FF) with soft halos. Crown of cosmic fire at top — three flame tongues in gradient from deep violet base (#4A148C) to bright magenta tip (#FF4081), ~40px tall. Tiny star/sparkle particles (6-8 dots, 2-3px each, white #FFFFFF) scattered in aura zone. Color palette: obsidian black, molten gold, electric violet, cosmic cyan, magenta fire. Style: ultimate mythic/divine, maximum visual impact, dark fantasy with vibrant energy effects.
Notes: assets/frames/mythic.png — most visually dramatic frame. Energy effects extend to canvas edges.

Description: Silhouette of a hooded adventurer figure from shoulders up, centered on transparent background. Figure is solid dark charcoal (#37474F) with no facial features — just outline of hood, shoulders, and slight suggestion of a cloak clasp at neck. Single subtle highlight along hood's left edge (#546E7A) for depth. Behind silhouette, a soft circular gradient glow: center is muted teal (#26A69A at 15% opacity) fading to transparent at ~200px radius. No background, no frame — sits inside frame cutout. Style: mysterious, minimal, dark fantasy — 'unknown hero' placeholder. Clean vector-like edges, no texture noise.
Notes: assets/frames/default_avatar.png — used by avatar_renderer.py when profile picture missing. Must work visually inside any of the 7 rank frames.

Description: Wide banner. Dark fantasy war-room scene viewed from above at slight angle. Large wooden table in center with glowing tactical map — abstract terrain (mountains, rivers, paths) as faint luminous lines (#4FC3F7 at 40% opacity) on aged parchment. Scattered on table: quill pen, inkwell, 2-3 small gold coin stacks, a dagger holding down one map corner, half-melted candle providing warm key light from right. Background fades to deep shadow (#1A1A2E). Left edge shows hint of stone wall with mounted torch (warm orange #FF8F00). Color palette: deep navy (#0D1B2A), warm candlelight (#FFB74D), parchment tan (#D7CCC8), teal map lines, gold coin accents. Mood: strategic command center, atmospheric, cinematic. Style: painted digital art, slightly stylized fantasy illustration.
Notes: Notion page cover for Daily Dashboard. Keep focal content in center 60% horizontally — Notion crops edges.

Description: Wide banner. Close-up of fantasy character stat sheet carved into stone, viewed straight on. Dark slate stone slab with five glowing stat symbols in horizontal row across center: fist/bicep (STR, red glow #EF5350), open book (INT, blue glow #42A5F5), owl eye (WIS, green glow #66BB6A), heart with pulse line (VIT, orange glow #FFA726), theater mask (CHA, purple glow #AB47BC). Each symbol etched into stone with glow emanating from carved grooves. Above symbols, chiseled text 'CHARACTER' in weathered serif font. Stone has dark slate texture (#37474F) with subtle moss in bottom corners. Ambient blue-white torchlight from above. Color palette: dark slate, colored stat glows, stone grey, moss green accents. Style: carved-stone RPG aesthetic, atmospheric lighting.
Notes: Notion page cover for Character page. Keep stat symbols centered — Notion crops top and bottom.

Description: Wide banner. Weathered wooden quest board mounted on stone dungeon wall. Board is dark planks with visible iron nail heads and rope hinges. Three parchment quest notices pinned with red wax seals and iron tacks — parchments slightly curled at edges, aged yellow-brown (#D7CCC8) with illegible handwritten text (wavy lines, not actual words). Hanging lantern on left casts warm directional light (#FFB74D) creating strong shadows on right. Stone wall behind is dark grey (#424242) with damp patches and single crack. Cobweb in upper-right corner. Small dagger stabbed into board between two notices. Color palette: dark wood browns (#3E2723, #5D4037), aged parchment, warm lantern orange, cold stone grey. Mood: adventurer's guild, mysterious, inviting danger. Style: painted fantasy illustration.
Notes: Notion page cover for Quest Board page.

Description: Circular badge on transparent background. Clenched iron gauntlet fist punching upward through cracked stone surface. Fist is dark steel grey (#455A64) with specular highlights on knuckles. Cracks radiate outward from impact point in starburst pattern. Behind fist, burst of warm energy — short rays of orange-red (#FF5722) and gold (#FFC107). Circular badge border is thin gunmetal ring (3px) with subtle bevel. Background fill within circle is dark gradient from deep red (#B71C1C) at bottom to near-black (#1A1A1A) at top. Style: bold, impactful, comic-book energy. Clean edges, high contrast.
Notes: assets/icons/first_blood.png — stored in Achievements DB Icon URL field via Cloudinary.

Description: Circular badge on transparent background. Stylized flame shape centered — three tongues, tallest in center (~60% badge height). Base color dark bronze (#6D4C1A) transitioning to bright copper (#CD7F32) at tips with white-hot highlight dot at each tip. Behind flame, faint radial glow of warm amber (#FF8F00 at 20% opacity). Number '3' subtly embossed at flame base in lighter bronze. Badge border 3px bronze ring with hammered texture. Background fill deep warm brown (#3E2723) to near-black gradient. Style: warm metallic, understated — first streak milestone.

Circular badge on transparent background. Same flame composition as Bronze but elevated. Flame in polished silver (#C0C0C0) with cool blue highlights (#90CAF9) along edges. Four flame tongues instead of three — slightly taller. Faint icy-blue particle trail from each tip (2-3 tiny dots, #E3F2FD). Number '7' embossed at base in bright silver. Badge border 3px polished silver ring with single engraved center line. Background fill deep cool blue-grey (#263238) to black gradient. Style: cool, refined, progressing power.

Circular badge on transparent background. Five flame tongues, taller and dynamic with curving motion. Rich gold (#FFD700) with bright yellow (#FFEB3B) inner cores and white-hot (#FFFFFF) tips. Visible heat-shimmer glow surrounding flame (soft radial #FFF176 at 25% opacity, 6px). Number '14' at base in dark gold (#FF8F00) with sharp shadow. Two small ember particles floating on each side. Badge border 3px ornate gold ring with tiny notch details. Background fill deep amber (#E65100) to black gradient. Style: warm, powerful, prestigious.

Circular badge on transparent background. Flame now abstract and crystalline — five sharp geometric flame shapes like cut gemstone facets. Platinum white (#E0E0E0) with prismatic edge reflections showing faint rainbow colors (thin 1px spectral lines along facet edges). Cool white aura radiates outward (8px glow, #FFFFFF at 15% opacity). Number '30' in crisp platinum at base with subtle drop shadow. Small diamond sparkle points (4 total, 2px each) floating around flame. Badge border 3px platinum ring with inner channel glowing faint blue-white. Background fill deep charcoal (#1A1A2E) to black gradient. Style: premium, crystalline, otherworldly precision.

Circular badge on transparent background. Flame evolved into radiant diamond-shaped crystal hovering above small flame base. Crystal is multi-faceted with high-contrast reflections — bright white (#FFFFFF) faces, pale ice-blue (#E1F5FE) mid-tones, deep sapphire (#1565C0) shadows in facet creases. Small flame beneath crystal is blue-white (#90CAF9). Intense light rays from diamond (6 rays alternating long/short, #BBDEFB at 30% opacity). Number '60' at bottom in icy blue. Badge border 3px diamond-dust textured ring (tiny bright dots on dark silver). Background fill deep navy (#0D1B2A) to black with subtle star-field (3-4 tiny white dots). Style: rare, luminous, awe-inspiring.

Circular badge on transparent background. Transcendent cosmic flame — swirling vortex of energy rather than traditional fire. Colors cycle through deep violet (#7C4DFF) at base, electric magenta (#FF4081) mid-section, brilliant cyan (#00E5FF) at apex. Vortex has visible spiral energy lines rotating clockwise. Double-layer glow: inner violet (#7C4DFF, 6px, 40% opacity), outer cyan (#00E5FF, 10px, 15% opacity). Number '100' at base in glowing white with magenta shadow. Tiny arcane rune-like symbols (3, ~4px each) orbit the vortex. Badge border 3px ring shifting between dark purple and deep blue (gradient along ring). Background fill cosmic black (#0A0A1A) with subtle nebula-like color wisps. Style: ultimate achievement, maximum cosmic energy, mythic transcendence.

Circular badge on transparent background. Tall stack of gold coins (8-10 coins) with top coin tilted slightly toward viewer showing stamped crown emblem on face. Coins rich gold (#FFD700) with dark gold (#B8860B) shadows between each edge. Single green upward arrow (#4CAF50) rises from behind stack indicating surplus/profit. Two small sparkle stars on either side (white, 3px each). Badge border 3px gold ring. Background fill deep green (#1B5E20) to black gradient — prosperity theme. Style: clean iconographic, confident financial achievement.

Circular badge on transparent background. Heraldic shield centered in bronze (#CD7F32) with dark outline (#5D4037). Shield has raised central boss (small circle) and large stylized 'S' engraved in center in dark bronze (#6D4C1A) with thin bright highlight on left edge. Two crossed short swords behind shield, blades up, in slightly darker bronze. Badge border 3px hammered bronze ring. Background fill warm dark brown (#3E2723) to black gradient. Style: heraldic, medieval, earned through service.

Circular badge on transparent background. Knight's great helm (bucket helm) viewed from front in polished silver steel (#B0BEC5) with dark visor slit (#263238). Single blue plume from helmet crest (#1565C0) curving right. Helmet has visible rivets (4 small dots) and subtle cross ventilation pattern on right cheek. Horizontal sword blade extends behind helmet on each side. Badge border 3px steel ring with single engraved chevron at top. Background fill dark blue-grey (#1A237E) to black gradient. Style: noble warrior, polished armor, cool-toned.

Circular badge on transparent background. Ornate golden crown with five points, center tallest. Rich gold (#FFD700) with red velvet interior visible between points (#C62828). Center point has ruby (#D32F2F), flanking sapphires (#1565C0), outer emeralds (#2E7D32) — each with white specular dot. Crown sits on small red velvet cushion base. Badge border 3px ornate gold ring with pearl-like dots. Background fill deep royal purple (#4A148C) to black gradient. Style: regal, prestigious, tournament champion.

Circular badge on transparent background. Spread angel wings viewed from front — feathered, symmetrical, golden-white. Wings extend from central shield/crest emblem. Feathers transition from bright gold (#FFD700) at base to pure white (#FFFFFF) at tips. Each wing has 3 distinct feather layers with individual shapes visible. Central crest is small diamond with bright starburst. Warm radiant glow from behind wings (#FFF176 at 20% opacity). Badge border 3px gold ring with laurel pattern. Background fill deep warm gold (#E65100) to black gradient. Style: heroic, angelic, triumphant ascension.

Circular badge on transparent background. Radiant eight-pointed star of overlapping geometric shapes. Platinum-white (#E0E0E0) with each point emitting thin light ray reaching near badge border. Inner core glows bright blue-white (#E3F2FD). Smaller secondary points create 16-pointed starburst effect. Thin orbiting ring at ~60% radius (pale blue #90CAF9, 1px, slightly tilted for 3D). Tiny sparkle dots (6, scattered, 1-2px, white) fill space between star and border. Badge border 3px platinum ring with faint inner glow. Background fill deep space blue (#0D1B2A) to black. Style: cosmic legend, radiant authority.

Circular badge on transparent background. Cosmic infinity symbol (lemniscate) rendered in flowing energy, horizontal. Swirling energy transitions from deep violet (#7C4DFF) on left loop through magenta (#FF4081) at crossing to electric cyan (#00E5FF) on right loop. Visible energy particles flowing along infinity path (tiny bright dots 1-2px). Crossing point has intense bright white (#FFFFFF) concentration. Dark nebula background within circle — subtle clouds of violet and blue. Three small arcane symbols float around infinity (triangle, circle, diamond, ~5px each, #B388FF at 40% opacity). Badge border 3px color-shifting gradient ring (violet to cyan). Background fill cosmic void (#0A0A1A) with subtle purple nebula wisps. Style: ultimate transcendence, cosmic power, beyond mortal.

Circular badge on transparent background. Rolled parchment scroll unfurled diagonally from bottom-left to upper-right. Aged tan (#D7CCC8) with darker burnt edges (#8D6E63) and faint illegible text lines. Large emerald-green checkmark (#4CAF50) stamps across scroll center — bold, confident, slightly angled with subtle green glow (#66BB6A at 20% opacity). Red wax seal hangs from scroll bottom-right on short ribbon with stamped star pattern. Badge border 3px dark bronze ring (#5D4037). Background fill dark forest green (#1B5E20) to black gradient. Style: adventure begins, quest completed, satisfying confirmation.

Circular badge on transparent background. Vibrant green apple centered in clean illustrative style. Bright green (#4CAF50) with highlight patch of lighter green (#81C784) on upper-left. Small brown stem (#5D4037) with single green leaf (#2E7D32) at top. Thin golden halo ring (#FFD700, 2px) floats above apple at slight angle suggesting purity. Two small sparkle stars flanking apple (white, 2px). Badge border 3px fresh green ring (#388E3C). Background fill deep green (#1B5E20) to dark (#0D1B0D) gradient. Style: clean, fresh, health-positive, vibrant.

Circular badge on transparent background. Medieval tower shield viewed straight on in dark iron (#37474F) with visible hammered texture and three horizontal reinforcement bands. Shield slightly battered — one small dent upper-right and scratch across middle band — but unbroken. Glowing rune symbol (vertical line with dot above, representing willpower) etched in shield center, glowing orange-red (#FF5722, 3px glow). Two crossed iron chains behind shield. Badge border 3px dark iron ring with rust-brown (#5D4037) spots. Background fill deep charcoal (#263238) to black gradient. Style: endurance, unyielding, battle-scarred but standing.

Circular badge on transparent background. Ornate treasure chest viewed from front-top angle, lid thrown wide open. Dark wood (#4E342E) with gold metal bands (#FFD700) and corner brackets. Open interior overflows with treasure — visible gold coins, blue gem (#42A5F5), green gem (#66BB6A), small crown peeking out. Bright golden light bursts upward from inside (5-6 short rays, #FFEB3B at 50% opacity). Two small coins in mid-air as if launched from opening. Badge border 3px gold ring with notch details. Background fill deep amber (#E65100) to black gradient. Style: treasure trove, excitement of discovery, abundance.

Circular badge on transparent background. Broken iron chain — two segments pulling apart at center with 2-3 links flying off from break point. Chains dark iron (#455A64) with bright specular highlights. At break point, bright burst of green energy (#4CAF50, radial glow 8px, 40% opacity) symbolizing freedom. Single gold coin (#FFD700) with checkmark hovers in burst center. Badge border 3px ring half iron-grey (top) half green (bottom). Background fill deep teal (#004D40) to black gradient. Style: liberation, breaking free, triumphant release.

Circular badge on transparent background. Human skull from front, bleached bone white (#EFEBE9) with dark eye sockets (#1A1A1A). Two phoenix wings spread from behind skull — fiery, transitioning from dark red (#B71C1C) at base through bright orange (#FF5722) to brilliant yellow (#FFEB3B) at feather tips. Each wing 3-4 feather layers with flame-like shapes. Faint soul-fire wisp from skull crown (small blue-white flame #90CAF9, 10px tall). Skull has hairline crack forehead to jaw. Badge border 3px ring alternating dark red and bone white segments. Background fill deep crimson (#4A0000) to black gradient. Style: death and rebirth, defiant resurrection, dark but triumphant.

Circular badge on transparent background. Heavy iron chain pulled taut diagonally snapping at center — links deforming and breaking apart. Bright energy sparks (#FFEB3B, 6-8 small dots 1-2px) fly from break point. Behind breaking chain, large upward-pointing arrow (#F44336, bold, thick, angular not rounded) symbolizing new personal record. Faint shockwave ring from break point (thin circle #FFC107 at 20% opacity). Badge border 3px dark iron ring with red (#F44336) stripe at 12 o'clock. Background fill deep steel blue (#1A237E) to black gradient. Style: raw power, limit-breaking, explosive achievement.

Circular badge on transparent background. Open leather-bound journal viewed from above at slight angle. Cover is rich dark brown leather (#4E342E) with lighter worn patch on spine. Open pages show faint lined text (wavy horizontal lines #BDBDBD). White feather quill pen rests diagonally across right page, nib upper-right, small ink drop at tip (#1A237E). Tiny ink bottle at bottom-left of book (dark blue glass #1A237E with cork stopper). Warm reading-light glow from pages (#FFF176 at 15% opacity). Badge border 3px dark leather-brown ring (#3E2723). Background fill deep warm brown (#2E1A0E) to black gradient. Style: scholarly, reflective, daily dedication.

Circular badge on transparent background. Two overlapping speech bubbles — larger left (soft purple #CE93D8), smaller right (warm coral #EF9A9A) — rounded corners with small tail triangles down. Overlap blends to lighter lavender (#E1BEE7). Inside each bubble: three horizontal dots (ellipsis) in white suggesting active conversation. Three small heart shapes (#F48FB1, 3px each) float above bubbles in arc. Subtle warmth glow around both (#FCE4EC at 15% opacity). Badge border 3px warm purple ring (#8E24AA). Background fill deep plum (#4A148C) to black gradient. Style: warm, social, connection and charisma.

Circular badge on transparent background. Stylized owl face viewed from front — large round eyes with golden irises (#FFD700) and dark pupils, small sharp beak (#8D6E63), prominent feathered eyebrow tufts upward. Dark brown (#4E342E) outer feathers, lighter tan (#8D6E63) facial disc. Owl perches on horizontal golden balance scale beam (classic scales of justice). Two small hanging pans — left holds tiny gold coin, right holds tiny green gem, roughly balanced. Badge border 3px warm gold ring (#DAA520). Background fill deep forest brown (#1B0E00) to black gradient. Style: wisdom, discernment, thoughtful resource management.

Circular badge on transparent background. Plain hexagonal shield shape centered, flat medium grey (#757575) with thin darker grey (#424242) outline and single horizontal line across center suggesting blank banner/ribbon area for customization. Shield has subtle inner bevel (1px lighter edge top/left, 1px darker bottom/right). No symbols, no text, no embellishments — intentionally blank. Badge border 3px neutral grey ring (#616161). Background fill flat dark grey (#303030) to near-black gradient. Style: deliberately blank template — clean placeholder shape.
Notes: assets/icons/ — use as starting template for remaining ~20 achievement badges. 43 total need icons.

Description: Flat-style circular icon on transparent background. Tightly wound spiral in center coiling inward clockwise in jagged/uneven line weight — thicker in some segments, thinner in others suggesting tension. Spiral is dusty orange-red (#E64A19) with innermost coil darkest (#BF360C) and outermost lighter (#FF8A65). Three small zigzag stress marks radiate from top-right in dark red (#C62828). Background circle fill pale warm grey (#EFEBE9) with subtle vignette at edges. Style: expressive, slightly unsettled, clear emotional read at small size.
Notes: Optional — used in Mood DB Icon field. Can use Notion emoji instead.

Description: Flat-style circular icon on transparent background. Simplified sun shape with circular center and 8 short triangular rays. Center bright warm yellow (#FFD600), rays golden-orange (#FFB300). Small upward-curving arc (smile) in center circle in darker orange (#FF8F00). Two small dots above arc for eyes (#FF8F00). Three tiny sparkle stars (white, 2px each) scattered around rays. Background circle fill pale sunshine yellow (#FFFDE7). Style: warm, uplifting, unmistakably happy. Reads clearly at 64px.

Flat-style circular icon on transparent background. Single water droplet shape falling downward in muted blue-grey (#78909C). Inside droplet, small downward-curving arc (frown) in darker grey (#455A64). Above droplet, faint circular ripple pattern (2 concentric thin rings #90A4AE at 40% opacity) suggesting the drop has already fallen once. Small diagonal line through upper-left (#90A4AE) like rain streak. Background circle fill cool pale grey (#ECEFF1). Style: melancholy, reflective, looking backward.

Flat-style circular icon on transparent background. Small rain cloud shape in upper portion — soft blue-grey (#90A4AE) with flat bottom edge. Three vertical rain lines descend from cloud as thin dashes (not solid) in medium blue (#42A5F5). Below rain, small puddle shape (flat ellipse #42A5F5 at 30% opacity). Background circle fill cool desaturated blue (#E3F2FD) with slight darkening toward bottom. Style: gentle sadness, not dramatic — quiet and understated.

Flat-style circular icon on transparent background. Simple analog clock face with circular outline in medium grey (#9E9E9E). Hour and minute hands both pointing to ~3:00 (both right side, drooping). Clock has only 4 hour markers (12/3/6/9) as small dots. Small wavy line (~) below clock in lighter grey (#BDBDBD) suggesting yawn or sigh. Background circle fill flat neutral beige (#F5F5F5) — deliberately bland. Style: flat, low-energy, visually monotone — the icon itself feels bored.

Flat-style circular icon on transparent background. Bold exclamation mark centered — main stroke bright electric yellow (#FFD600), thick and slightly tapered (wider top, narrower bottom). Dot below is perfect circle in bright orange (#FF6D00). Behind exclamation, starburst of 6 thin lines radiating outward in warm yellow (#FFC107 at 60% opacity). Two small circles on either side at top (like wide eyes) in dark grey (#424242) outline only, no fill. Background circle fill pale warm yellow (#FFF8E1). Style: dynamic, high-energy, instant recognition.

Flat-style circular icon on transparent background. Simple face circle (outline only, medium grey #9E9E9E) with eyes as two downward-angled diagonal lines (looking down/away). Below face, two hands (simplified mitten shapes) covering lower half of face in warm pink-beige (#FFAB91). Subtle warm blush on cheeks — two small pink circles (#EF9A9A at 40% opacity) on either side of nose area. Background circle fill muted warm pink (#FBE9E7). Style: vulnerable, self-conscious, turning inward — empathetic not judgmental.

Closed wooden loot crate viewed from front 3/4 angle on transparent background. Plain pine wood texture (#8D6E63) with visible plank lines and two dark iron bands (#455A64) wrapping horizontally. Simple iron latch on front. No glow, no particles — intentionally mundane. Slight shadow underneath for grounding. Small dull grey gem (#9E9E9E) in latch. Color palette: plain wood browns, iron grey. Flat even lighting with minimal highlights. Style: functional container, common drop, nothing special — the baseline.
Notes: Optional — Notion Loot Box Inventory visual. Rarity hierarchy: Common < Rare < Epic < Legendary.

Description: Same loot crate composition as Common but upgraded. Darker richer wood (#5D4037). Iron bands replaced with polished steel (#78909C) with bolt details. Latch has glowing blue gem (#42A5F5) with soft radial glow (4px, 30% opacity). Thin blue light line seeps from lid crack (#42A5F5 at 50% opacity) suggesting something glowing inside. Two small blue sparkle dots above lid. Color palette: dark wood, polished steel, sapphire blue glow. Style: something good is inside — worth opening.

Same crate composition significantly enhanced. Near-black ebony wood (#1A1A2E) with purple-tinted grain. Bands are ornate silver with engraved swirl patterns. Bright purple gem (#7C4DFF) on latch with strong glow (6px, 40% opacity). Bright purple light pours from lid crack and keyhole (#B388FF at 60% opacity). Swirling purple energy mist wraps around crate base. 4-5 floating purple particles above lid (2-4px). Crate edges have subtle motion-blur suggesting vibration. Color palette: ebony black, silver engravings, electric purple glow. Style: rare and powerful — you want this one.

Crate pushed to maximum. Obsidian black material (#0A0A1A) with veins of molten gold (#FFD700) cracking through surface. Bands are pure gold with gemstone inlays. Latch gem is massive multifaceted diamond emitting intense white-gold light. Lid crack erupts with golden-white energy beams (4-5 rays shooting upward, #FFEB3B at 70% opacity). Ring of fire/energy orbits crate at midpoint (thin, orange-gold). Dense particle field above — 8-10 floating embers, sparkles, energy motes in gold and white. Crate hovers slightly above shadow (2-3px gap). Color palette: obsidian black, molten gold, white-hot energy, amber fire. Style: legendary jackpot — barely containing its contents.

Modest roadside tavern/inn viewed from front on transparent background. Small two-story building with thatched straw roof (#8D6E63, messy texture), rough stone walls (#9E9E9E with darker mortar lines), single wooden door (dark brown #5D4037) with iron handle, one small upper window with dim warm candle glow (#FFB74D at 30% opacity). Hanging sign on rusty chain reads 'INN' in crude hand-painted letters on weathered wood. Small hay bale beside door. Dirt path in foreground. Deliberately humble. Color palette: straw brown, grey stone, dim candlelight. Style: cozy but cheap, starter-area RPG inn.
Notes: Optional — Hotel DB visual. Budget tier: 100 coins

Description: Respectable stone inn viewed from front on transparent background. Three-story with dark slate tile roof, clean-cut stone walls (#78909C) with visible block patterns, polished wooden double door (warm brown #6D4C41) with brass handles, three windows per floor with warm interior light (#FFB74D at 50% opacity) and glass panes. Painted wooden sign on iron bracket with bed/moon symbol. Small garden planter and lit street lantern flank entrance. Cobblestone path. Color palette: clean grey stone, warm brass, amber window glow, green planter accent. Style: comfortable mid-range, town's reliable establishment.

Grand castle-like luxury estate viewed from front on transparent background. Tall four-story with pointed tower spires on each end, white marble walls (#E0E0E0) with gold-trimmed (#FFD700) window frames and balcony railings. Ornate arched entrance with red velvet carpet (#C62828) extending outward. Tall stained glass windows in warm jewel tones (ruby, sapphire, emerald). Multiple wall-mounted golden sconce lanterns casting rich warm light. Fountain in foreground courtyard with gentle water arc. Manicured topiary flanking carpet. Color palette: white marble, gold trim, ruby carpet, stained glass jewel tones. Style: opulent, fit for royalty, the best money can buy.

Burlap sack tied with rope at top, sitting on dark wooden shelf, on transparent background. Sandy brown (#A1887F) with rough woven texture and visible question mark '?' printed on front in dark brown (#5D4037) paint. Rope tie is coarse tan (#8D6E63). Small wooden price tag hangs from rope with no text. Shelf beneath is dark walnut (#3E2723). Simple, no glow, no effects. Color palette: burlap sand, rope tan, dark wood. Style: generic mystery item, placeholder that looks intentional — not lazy, just unspecified.
Notes: Optional — Market DB Product Picture field placeholder.

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Bold red heart shape (#E53935) with white ECG/heartbeat pulse line running horizontally through center — one sharp peak in middle (classic heartbeat spike) flattening on both sides. Heart has subtle inner gradient (lighter red #EF5350 at top-left highlight). Thin circular border in soft red (#EF9A9A, 2px). Background circle fill pale pink (#FFEBEE). Style: clean, modern health iconography, instantly readable.
Notes: Optional — Vision Board category icon (1 of 8).

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Rising bar chart with three bars increasing left to right in dark navy blue (#1A237E). Tallest bar has small upward arrow at top (#42A5F5). Thin briefcase silhouette at bar base in darker blue (#0D47A1). Thin circular border in medium blue (#42A5F5, 2px). Background circle fill pale blue (#E3F2FD). Style: professional, growth-oriented, corporate-clean.
Notes: Optional — Vision Board category icon (2 of 8).

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Gold coin (#FFD700) in 3/4 angle with dollar sign '$' stamped on face in dark gold (#B8860B). Behind coin, small upward-trending line graph in green (#4CAF50) with 4-5 data points. Thin circular border in gold (#FFD700, 2px). Background circle fill pale warm yellow (#FFF8E1). Style: prosperity, financial growth, clean iconographic.
Notes: Optional — Vision Board category icon (3 of 8).

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Two simplified human silhouettes standing side by side — one slightly taller. Both warm coral (#EF5350). Shoulders overlap slightly suggesting closeness. Small heart shape (#F44336) floats between heads. Thin circular border in warm pink (#EF9A9A, 2px). Background circle fill pale pink (#FCE4EC). Style: warm, human connection, inclusive and gender-neutral.
Notes: Optional — Vision Board category icon (4 of 8).

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Open book viewed from front with pages fanning upward. Cover deep indigo (#1A237E), pages white (#FFFFFF) with faint text lines. Graduation cap on top at jaunty angle, tassel right (#263238 cap, #FFD600 tassel). Small lightbulb icon (#FFEB3B) above cap suggesting ideas. Thin circular border in indigo (#3F51B5, 2px). Background circle fill pale lavender (#E8EAF6). Style: knowledge, growth, academic achievement.
Notes: Optional — Vision Board category icon (5 of 8).

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Painter's palette from above — light wood tan (#D7CCC8) with thumb hole on left. Six small paint dabs around edge: red (#F44336), orange (#FF9800), yellow (#FFEB3B), green (#4CAF50), blue (#2196F3), purple (#9C27B0). Thin paintbrush diagonally across palette with rainbow-streaked bristle tip. Thin circular border in vibrant purple (#9C27B0, 2px). Background circle fill pale cream (#FFF3E0). Style: colorful, expressive, creative energy.
Notes: Optional — Vision Board category icon (6 of 8).

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Simple compass rose with N/S/E/W points in dark teal (#004D40). North point largest with bright teal tip (#26A69A). Behind compass, silhouette of mountain range in medium grey (#78909C) with snow-capped peak (white #FFFFFF tip) on tallest mountain. Small flag planted on peak. Thin circular border in teal (#26A69A, 2px). Background circle fill pale teal (#E0F2F1). Style: exploration, discovery, the call to adventure.
Notes: Optional — Vision Board category icon (7 of 8).

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Lotus flower with 5 petals viewed from above, symmetrically open. Petals soft lavender (#CE93D8) with slightly darker purple (#AB47BC) edges and bright white center (#FFFFFF). Above lotus, small radiant dot with thin emanating rays (6 rays, pale gold #FFD600 at 50% opacity) suggesting enlightenment. Thin circular border in soft purple (#CE93D8, 2px). Background circle fill pale lavender (#F3E5F5). Style: serene, mindful, inner peace — non-denominational.
Notes: Optional — Vision Board category icon (8 of 8).

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Crossed longsword and battle axe forming X shape from front. Sword polished steel (#B0BEC5) with gold cross-guard (#FFD700) and brown leather grip (#5D4037). Axe dark iron (#455A64) with weathered wooden handle (#6D4C41). Behind weapons, round shield (lower half visible) in red (#C62828) with gold boss. Thin circular border in dark red (#B71C1C, 2px). Background fill deep blood red (#4A0000) to dark gradient. Style: strength, combat prowess, front-line fighter.
Notes: Optional — Warrior class boosts STR stat.

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Tall wooden staff with glowing crystal orb at top. Staff is twisted dark wood (#4E342E) with vine carvings. Orb translucent blue (#42A5F5) with bright white core and soft blue glow (6px, 30% opacity). Three small arcane symbols orbit orb (triangle, circle, diamond ~6px each, pale blue #90CAF9 at 50% opacity). Few sparkle motes rising. Thin circular border in deep blue (#1565C0, 2px). Background fill midnight blue (#0D1B2A) to dark gradient. Style: arcane knowledge, intellectual power, magical mastery.
Notes: Optional — Mage class boosts INT stat.

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Two curved daggers crossed in X, blades up. Dark steel blades (#37474F) with sharp bright edge highlight (1px #CFD8DC) along cutting edges. Handles wrapped dark purple leather (#4A148C) with silver pommel caps. Behind daggers, subtle smoke/shadow wisp curling upward (#424242 at 40% opacity). Single golden coin (#FFD700) balanced on crossing point. Thin circular border in dark purple (#4A148C, 2px). Background fill near-black purple (#1A0A2E) to black gradient. Style: stealth, cunning, operates in shadows.
Notes: Optional — Rogue class boosts CHA stat.

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Tall kite shield viewed from front, white (#FAFAFA) with bold golden cross (#FFD700) centered with beveled edges catching upper-left light. Behind shield, warhammer handle upward — hammerhead visible at top, polished silver (#B0BEC5) with blunt square face and spiked back. Radiant halo of warm light (#FFF176 at 20% opacity) from behind shield. Small light rays (4, thin, #FFD700 at 30% opacity) from cross. Thin circular border in warm gold (#DAA520, 2px). Background fill deep royal blue (#0D47A1) to dark gradient. Style: holy protection, righteous strength, guardian of light.
Notes: Optional — Paladin class boosts VIT stat.

Description: Circular icon on transparent background. Recurve bow in drawing position with arrow nocked and pulled back. Bow warm wood (#6D4C41) with green leather grip (#2E7D32). Arrow has steel tip (#B0BEC5) and green fletching (#4CAF50). Behind bow, silhouette of pine trees (3, dark green #1B5E20, varying heights) for wilderness. Small crescent moon upper-right (#FFD600, thin crescent). Thin circular border in forest green (#2E7D32, 2px). Background fill deep forest green (#0D1B0D) to black gradient. Style: precision, nature attunement, independent and self-reliant.
Notes: Optional — Ranger class boosts WIS stat.

Description: Programmatically generated by chart_renderer.py using matplotlib. 5-axis radar chart showing STR/INT/WIS/VIT/CHA. Dark background (#1A1A2E), stat lines in bright colors per stat, filled polygon with alpha. Uploaded to Cloudinary after generation.
Notes: Generated programmatically by chart_renderer.py (Phase 5). Regenerated daily by Phase 7 automation. NOT a static asset — tracked for cross-phase wiring.
